text: 🇺🇦 🏃 A man forgot he needed a crutch when the TCC tried to mobilize him 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 🏃 一名男子在被TCC试图动员时忘记了自己需要拐杖 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 US Warns Buyers of Iranian Oil Face Fresh Sanctions The US imposed new hostile sanctions on Iran's oil transportation infrastructure (targeting dozens of individuals, companies, and vessels) and warned of secondary sanctions on buyers of Iranian oil, including potential action against China. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent stated the US is willing to apply secondary sanctions if Iranian oil money sits in foreign banks.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 美国警告伊朗石油买家将面临新制裁 美国对伊朗的石油运输基础设施实施了新的敌对制裁（针对数十名个人、公司和船只），并警告称将对伊朗石油买家实施二级制裁，包括可能针对中国采取行动。财政部长斯科特·贝森特表示，如果伊朗石油资金存放在外国银行，美国愿意实施二级制裁。

text: Open Source Intel IDF troops from the 769th Brigade, operating under the 91st Division in southern Lebanon, thwarted two attempted attacks by terrorist cells. The cells were identified and eliminated through drone and joint airstrikes. Forces also uncovered weapons including Kalashnikov rifles, anti-tank rockets, RPG launchers, and an underground storage facility containing mortar shells. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列国防军第769旅在黎巴嫩南部第91师指挥下，挫败了恐怖分子小组的两次袭击企图。这些小组通过无人机和联合空袭被识别并消灭。部队还发现了包括卡拉什尼科夫步枪、反坦克火箭、RPG发射器以及一个装有迫击炮弹的地下储存设施在内的武器。推文

text: Visioner 🇷🇺 🇬🇧 🇪🇺 🇹🇷 BREAKING | The Russian Federation threatens Europe with strikes on factories where drones are allegedly produced for Ukraine. 🔹 The Russian Federation threatens Europe with strikes on factories where, as they claim, unmanned aerial vehicles are produced for Ukraine. The Russian Ministry of Defense has published the addresses of these facilities—- the list includes: the United Kingdom, Germany, Denmark, Latvia, Lithuania, the Netherlands, Poland, the Czech Republic, Spain, Italy, Israel, and Turkey. 🔹 The Russian Ministry of Defense assesses the supply of unmanned aerial vehicles to Ukraine as a "deliberate step leading to a sharp escalation of the military-political situation." See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇷🇺 🇬🇧 🇪🇺 🇹🇷 突发 | 俄罗斯联邦威胁欧洲，称将打击据称生产乌克兰无人机的工厂。 🔹 俄罗斯联邦威胁欧洲，称将打击据称生产乌克兰无人机的工厂。俄罗斯国防部公布了这些设施的地址——名单包括：英国、德国、丹麦、拉脱维亚、立陶宛、荷兰、波兰、捷克共和国、西班牙、意大利、以色列和土耳其。 🔹 俄罗斯国防部将向乌克兰供应无人机评估为“导致军事政治局势急剧升级的蓄意步骤”。与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah fired a missile from Lebanon at the southern Haifa Bay area overnight. No sirens sounded. The missile struck an open area. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 真主党昨晚从黎巴嫩向海法湾南部地区发射了一枚导弹。没有警报声响起。导弹击中了一片开阔地。推文

text: Open Source Intel I am trying to understand what President Trump means over here. U.S. President Donald Trump: Trying to get a little breathing room between Israel and Lebanon. It has been a long time since the two leaders have spoken, like 34 years. It will happen tomorrow. Nice! President DJT." Contributed by @AZ_Intel_. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044619888522592350/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 我试图理解特朗普总统在这里的意思。美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“试图在以色列和黎巴嫩之间争取一点喘息空间。两位领导人已经很久没有交谈了，大约34年了。明天就会发生。太好了！特朗普总统。” 由 @AZ_Intel_ 贡献。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044619888522592350/photo/1 - 开源情报 推文

text: Open Source Intel Senate Democrats failed to block arms sales to Israel. 40 voted against bulldozer sales, 36 against 1,000-lb bombs. Both measures killed by Republican opposition. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 参议院民主党人未能阻止对以色列的武器销售。40票反对推土机销售，36票反对1000磅炸弹。两项措施均因共和党的反对而被否决。推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese leadership embarrassed after Israel’s ambassador said both sides agreed Hezbollah is a shared enemy Rising concern in the anti-Hezbollah camp: talks with Israel could push Hezbollah to try to kiII President Joesph Aoun and Lebanon PM Salam. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044662403518914614/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 在以色列大使表示双方都同意真主党是共同敌人后，黎巴嫩领导层感到尴尬。反真主党阵营日益担忧：与以色列的谈判可能会促使真主党试图暗杀约瑟夫·奥恩总统和黎巴嫩总理萨拉姆。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044662403518914614/photo/1 推文

text: 🔄 Forwarded from 🇦🇺AussieCossack🇷🇺: ❗️ BREAKING: Albanese proudly announces he has just secured 100 million litres of diesel to fix the fuel crisis. 😳 For comparison Australia's daily diesel consumption is approximately 92 million litres per day. 😂 So to be clear, Albanese is giving himself a pat on the back for organising a mere 1 days worth of diesel. 🤦‍♂ @AussieCossack
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 🇦🇺AussieCossack🇷🇺: ❗️ 突发：阿尔巴尼斯自豪地宣布，他刚刚获得了1亿升柴油以解决燃料危机。 😳 相比之下，澳大利亚每天的柴油消耗量约为9200万升。 😂 所以说清楚点，阿尔巴尼斯因为仅仅组织了1天的柴油用量而沾沾自喜。 🤦‍♂ @AussieCossack

text: 🇫🇷 France has cancelled the arrest of the tanker Deyna, which was heading from Russia under a Mozambican flag and was seized on March 20, and released it, according to the prefecture. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇫🇷 据省政府称，法国已取消对悬挂莫桑比克国旗、从俄罗斯出发并于3月20日被扣押的油轮“Deyna”号的逮捕令，并将其释放。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Reuters: Lebanon has not yet been briefed on last night’s Israeli security cabinet discussions, according to a Lebanese official. The official said Lebanon assesses that Israel is seeking to secure a victory in Bint Jbeil before any diplomatic progress moves forward. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 路透社：据一位黎巴嫩官员称，黎巴嫩尚未获悉昨晚以色列安全内阁讨论的情况。该官员表示，黎巴嫩评估认为，以色列正寻求在任何外交进展推进之前，在宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）取得胜利。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "The U.S. Senate voted against stopping arms sales to Israel. More than 30 Democrats backed Bernie Sanders’ effort to block the sales. The measures failed due to Republican opposition." 40 Democratic senators voted to block bulldozer sales to Israel (about 85% of Democrats). A separate vote to block 1,000-lb bombs failed 36–63 (about 77% of Democrats supported it). The Democratic caucus has 47 members, meaning roughly 75%–85% supported at least one restriction. For comparison, a similar vote in 2025 had 27 Democratic supporters (about 57%).
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“美国参议院投票反对停止向以色列出售武器。超过30名民主党人支持伯尼·桑德斯（Bernie Sanders）阻止这些销售的努力。由于共和党的反对，这些措施未能通过。” 40名民主党参议员投票阻止向以色列出售推土机（约85%的民主党人）。另一项阻止出售1000磅炸弹的投票以36票对63票失败（约77%的民主党人支持）。民主党党团有47名成员，这意味着大约75%至85%的人支持至少一项限制措施。相比之下，2025年的一次类似投票有27名民主党支持者（约57%）。

text: Republicans are growing uneasy that Trump is undermining their midterm chances with distractions and off-message moments. One GOP operative said, “Everything is made more difficult by the nonsense coming out of 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue.” Source: POLITICO
text_zh: 共和党人越来越担心特朗普因分心和偏离主题的时刻而破坏他们的中期选举胜算。一位共和党特工表示：“来自宾夕法尼亚大道1600号的胡言乱语让一切都变得更加困难。” 来源：POLITICO

text: Stephen Miller almost says “final solution” about Iran—then catches himself mid-sentence.
text_zh: 斯蒂芬·米勒（Stephen Miller）在谈到伊朗时差点说出“最终解决方案”，随后在话语中途改口。

text: The Pentagon is asking companies like General Motors and Ford Motor to help boost U.S. weapons production as conflicts strain military supplies. Officials are exploring whether manufacturers can shift some factory capacity to produce munitions and equipment, similar to WWII-era industry mobilization. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 五角大楼正要求通用汽车和福特汽车等公司帮助提高美国武器产量，因为冲突使军事供应紧张。官员们正在探索制造商是否可以将部分工厂产能转移到生产弹药和设备上，类似于二战时期的工业动员。 来源：WSJ

text: The U.S. Senate voted against stopping arms sales to Israel. More than 30 Democrats backed Bernie Sanders’ effort to block the sales. The measures failed due to Republican opposition.
text_zh: 美国参议院投票反对停止向以色列出售武器。超过30名民主党人支持伯尼·桑德斯阻止此次军售的努力。由于共和党的反对，这些措施未能通过。

text: Trump: Trying to get a little breathing room between Israel and Lebanon. It has been a long time since the two leaders have spoken, like 34 years. It will happen tomorrow. Nice!
text_zh: 特朗普：试图在以色列和黎巴嫩之间争取一点喘息的空间。这两位领导人已经很久没有通话了，大概有34年了。明天就会实现。太好了！

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Southern Command: "On April 15, at the direction of SOUTHCOM commander Gen. Francis L. Donovan, Joint Task Force Southern Spear conducted a lethal kinetic strike on a vessel operated by Designated Terrorist Organizations. Intelligence confirmed the vessel was transiting along known narco-trafficking routes in the Eastern Pacific and was engaged in narco-trafficking operations. Three male narco-terrorists were killed during this action. No U.S. military forces were harmed." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报美国南方司令部：“4月15日，在南方司令部司令弗朗西斯·L·多诺万将军的指挥下，南方之矛联合特遣部队对一艘由指定恐怖组织运营的船只进行了致命的动能打击。情报证实，该船只正沿东太平洋已知的毒品走私路线航行，并参与了毒品走私活动。三名男性毒品恐怖分子在这次行动中被击毙。没有美国军事力量受到伤害。”推文

text: Visioner ‼️ ‼️ BREAKING | Frontline - "Leningrad against NATO": 🇫🇮 Finland will deploy more than 100 howitzers of 155 mm caliber on the Russian border — announces the country's Ministry of Defense. 🇷🇺 In response, the authorities of the Russian border region declare that the Leningrad region has become a frontline (advanced position); currently, air defense is being urgently strengthened there and fortifications are being built. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ ‼️ 突发 | 前线 - “列宁格勒对抗北约”：🇫🇮 芬兰将在俄罗斯边境部署100多门155毫米口径榴弹炮——该国国防部宣布。🇷🇺 作为回应，俄罗斯边境地区的当局宣布列宁格勒地区已成为前线（前沿阵地）；目前，那里的防空系统正在紧急加强，防御工事正在建设中。与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部谢莫纳什莫纳及对抗线周边地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 Israel Hayom — owned by Miriam Adelson, one of the biggest Republican megadonors in America — just openly published: 'Israel has no choice but to re-establish a security zone, this time devoid of a civilian population.' Let that sink in. A major Israeli newspaper is straight-up calling for the ethnic cleansing of southern Lebanon . How deranged and sick do these Zionists have to be to publish this genocidal article like it's normal policy???
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 《今日以色列》——由美国共和党最大的捐款人之一米里亚姆·阿德尔森拥有——刚刚公开刊文称：“以色列别无选择，只能重新建立一个安全区，这次要清空平民。”请仔细想想。一家主要的以色列报纸竟然公然呼吁对黎巴嫩南部进行种族清洗。这些犹太复国主义者得有多疯狂、多病态，才会把这种种族灭绝的文章当作正常政策来发表？？？

text: 🔄 Forwarded from 🇦🇺AussieCossack🇷🇺: ❗️ A "significant" fire has broken out at one of Australia's two currently operational oil refineries, with residents in parts of Geelong told to stay indoors due to smoke. The Geelong refinery can process up to 120,000 barrels of oil a day, including "manufacturing petrol, diesel, LPG, jet fuel, avgas and Low Aromatic Fuel". It is one of two facilities in Australia, the other being in Brisbane, that can refine fuel domestically. @AussieCossack
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 🇦🇺AussieCossack🇷🇺：❗️ 澳大利亚目前仅有的两家炼油厂之一发生“重大”火灾，吉朗部分地区的居民被告知因烟雾留在室内。吉朗炼油厂每天可加工多达12万桶石油，包括“生产汽油、柴油、液化石油气、航空煤油、航空汽油和低芳烃燃料”。它是澳大利亚仅有的两家能在国内提炼燃料的设施之一，另一家位于布里斯班。 @AussieCossack

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇪 Right-wing candidate Rafael López Aliaga alleged fraud in Peru’s presidential election and gave the head of Peru’s electoral court a 24-hour ultimatum to annul the results, warning he would call for a “civil insurgency” if not complied with, saying “we…" ⚡️ 🇵🇪 With over 92% of ballots counted in Peru’s presidential election, left-wing candidate Roberto Sánchez has moved into second place with about 12%, overtaking Rafael López Aliaga, while Keiko Fujimori leads with nearly 17%. The top two will advance to a June runoff, with López Aliaga continuing to dispute the results. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇪 右翼候选人拉斐尔·洛佩斯·阿里亚加（Rafael López Aliaga）声称秘鲁总统选举存在舞弊，并向秘鲁选举法院院长发出24小时最后通牒，要求其宣布选举结果无效。他警告称，如果不遵守，他将呼吁进行“公民叛乱”，并表示“我们……”⚡️ 🇵🇪 秘鲁总统选举已统计超过92%的选票，左翼候选人罗伯托·桑切斯（Roberto Sánchez）以约12%的得票率升至第二位，超过了拉斐尔·洛佩斯·阿里亚加，而藤森庆子（Keiko Fujimori）以近17%的得票率领先。得票率最高的前两名将进入6月的决选，洛佩斯·阿里亚加继续对选举结果提出质疑。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇦🇺 AFP: Australia says it will boost spending on drones by up to A$5 billion as part of a broader push to adapt to changes in modern warfare. Defense Minister Richard Marles said the move is driven by lessons from conflicts in the Middle East and Ukraine…" ⚡️ 🇦🇺 Australia will raise defence spending to 3% of GDP by 2033, Defence Minister Richard Marles said, adding the plan includes major new investment in drones and autonomous systems. The government said the shift will require about A$53 billion (S$48.39 billion) in additional spending over the next decade, with A$14 billion allocated over the next four years, and noted the calculation now aligns with NATO standards that include defence-related costs like pensions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇦🇺 法新社：澳大利亚表示，作为适应现代战争变化更广泛推动力的一部分，将增加高达50亿澳元的无人机支出。国防部长理查德·马尔斯（Richard Marles）表示，此举是受中东和乌克兰冲突经验教训的驱动……” ⚡️ 🇦🇺 国防部长理查德·马尔斯表示，澳大利亚将在2033年前将国防支出提高到GDP的3%，并补充说该计划包括对无人机和自主系统的大规模新投资。政府表示，这一转变将在未来十年内需要约530亿澳元（约合483.9亿新元）的额外支出，其中未来四年将拨款140亿澳元，并指出目前的计算方式现已与北约标准保持一致，其中包括养老金等与国防相关的费用。@wfwitness

text: OSINTtechnical USAF bunker art from Muwaffaq Salti Air Base in Jordan. Hashmarks indicate the number of Iranian air raid warnings by day, with 89 total by March 15th. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044631377467863478/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 来自约旦穆瓦法克·萨尔蒂（Muwaffaq Salti）空军基地的美国空军掩体艺术。井字标记表示伊朗空袭警报的每日次数，截至3月15日总计89次。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044631377467863478/photo/1 推文

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Rybar in English: Fwd from @ #Summary for April 16, 2026 ▪️ In the past day, the enemy launched around 400 strike drones and missiles at its rear areas. At night, we struck Kyiv, Kharkiv, Dnipro, and Odesa. ▪️ The AFU sent drones at night to Sevastopol , Crimea , and Krasnodar . In Tuapse , two children were killed, two adults injured, and buildings damaged. The enemy is distributing footage of a fire in the Tuapse Refinery area. Classes in schools have been canceled. In Loo, drone debris fell at several addresses. ▪️ In the Sumy direction , the Sever Group is fighting in Shostka, Sumy, and Novodmitrivka. The enemy is transferring strike drone operators and forcibly mobilizing Territorial Defense. ▪️ In Belgorod , drones attacked agricultural enterprises, vehicles, and homes, injuring several people. Numerous areas are under AFU strikes. ▪️ In the Kharkiv direction , the Sever Group claims the capture of Volchansk Khutory . Combat continues near the border and in forest belts east of Syminivka. Our troops have tactical successes in the Velykobourluk sector. ▪️ In the Kupiansk direction , positional combat is ongoing in the city and to the south. ▪️ In the Slavyansk direction , fierce fighting continues for the breakthrough toward Rai-Aleksandrivka. The AFU counterattacks, but our forces straightened the front line in the Kalenyk – Kriva Luka area. ▪️ In the Kostyantynivka direction , combat is ongoing along previous lines. The enemy is pulling reinforcements into the city under drone strikes. ▪️ In Dnipropetrovsk , the Vostok Group continues to expand control toward Lisne. ▪️ In east Zaporizhia - offensive operations in the directions of Komsomolske and Charyvne. ▪️ On the Zaporizhia front - positional combat in the Prymorskyy and Stepnohorsk area. AFU counterattacks have negated previous Russian successes. The enemy strikes at energy infrastructure, leaving most of the region without power. ▪️ In Kherson , a drone strike on a car resulted in civilian injuries. Dozens of areas came under fire. Summary by: Two Majors ✨ Two Majors on MAX Original msg
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Rybar in English: 转发自 @ #2026年4月16日总结 ▪️ 过去一天，敌方在其后方区域发射了约400架攻击无人机和导弹。夜间，我们袭击了基辅、哈尔科夫、第聂伯罗和敖德萨。 ▪️ 乌克兰武装部队夜间向塞瓦斯托波尔、克里米亚和克拉斯诺达尔派遣了无人机。在图阿普谢，两名儿童死亡，两名成人受伤，建筑物受损。敌方正在散布图阿普谢炼油厂区域火灾的画面。学校课程已取消。在洛奥，无人机残骸坠落在多个地点。 ▪️ 在苏梅方向，北方部队集团正在肖斯特卡、苏梅和新德米特里夫卡作战。敌方正在调动攻击无人机操作员并强制动员领土防卫部队。 ▪️ 在别尔哥罗德，无人机袭击了农业企业、车辆和住宅，造成数人受伤。多个地区遭到乌克兰武装部队的打击。 ▪️ 在哈尔科夫方向，北方部队集团声称占领了沃尔昌斯克胡托里。边境附近及西米尼夫卡以东的林带战斗仍在继续。我们的部队在大布尔卢克区取得了战术性进展。 ▪️ 在库皮扬斯克方向，城市内及南部地区正在进行阵地战。 ▪️ 在斯拉维扬斯克方向，向赖-亚历山德里夫卡突破的激烈战斗仍在继续。乌克兰武装部队进行反击，但我们的部队在卡列尼克-克里瓦卢卡地区拉直了前线。 ▪️ 在康斯坦丁诺夫卡方向，战斗沿着之前的防线进行。敌方正在无人机打击下向城内调集增援部队。 ▪️ 在第聂伯罗彼得罗夫斯克，东方部队集团继续向利斯内方向扩大控制范围。 ▪️ 在扎波罗热东部 - 向共青团村和查里夫内方向进行进攻行动。 ▪️ 在扎波罗热前线 - 在普里莫尔斯基和斯捷普诺戈尔斯克地区进行阵地战。乌克兰武装部队的反击抵消了俄罗斯之前的战果。敌方袭击了能源基础设施，导致该地区大部分地区断电。 ▪️ 在赫尔松，一次无人机对车辆的袭击导致平民受伤。数十个地区遭到炮火袭击。总结：Two Majors ✨ Two Majors on MAX 原始消息

text: 🐻 Everything important you need to know about the past 24 hours: ➡️ JD Vance explains what Trump means when he says the Epstein thing is a hoax ➡️ Zelensky remembers his career in comedy ➡️ Ukrainian analyst explains why Ukraine mobilizes a lot of people every month but it doesn't really make a difference ➡️ Iran has been intensively removing debris from the entrances to its underground missile facilities ➡️ Trump claims Xi agreed not to supply weapons to Iran , and announces he is stopping the blockade for China and the good of the world ➡️ The Iranian Foreign Ministry representative did not confirm media reports about an agreement with the US to extend the ceasefire ➡️ Russia and Azerbaijan have reached a settlement on the consequences of the plane crash in December 2024, which soured relations between the two countries ➡️ Mike Johnson defends Trump attacking the Pope , and the White House should stop trying to explain things because they only make it worse ➡️ Budanov continues to go against Zelensky ➡️ The US is threatening Chinese banks ➡️ Russia’s Defense Ministry released locations of European, Israeli, and Turkish facilities tied to Ukrainian companies producing drones used for strikes against Russia. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🐻 过去24小时内你需要知道的所有重要事项：➡️ JD·万斯解释了特朗普所说的“爱泼斯坦事件是骗局”是什么意思 ➡️ 泽连斯基回忆起他的喜剧生涯 ➡️ 乌克兰分析人士解释了为什么乌克兰每月动员大量人员却收效甚微 ➡️ 伊朗一直在加紧清理其地下导弹设施入口处的瓦砾 ➡️ 特朗普声称习近平已同意不向伊朗提供武器，并宣布他将为了中国和世界的利益停止封锁 ➡️ 伊朗外交部代表未证实有关与美国达成延长停火协议的媒体报道 ➡️ 俄罗斯和阿塞拜疆就2024年12月导致两国关系恶化的飞机失事后果达成了和解 ➡️ 迈克·约翰逊为特朗普攻击教皇的行为辩护，并称白宫应停止试图解释，因为只会越描越黑 ➡️ 布达诺夫继续与泽连斯基唱反调 ➡️ 美国正在威胁中国银行 ➡️ 俄罗斯国防部公布了欧洲、以色列和土耳其与乌克兰无人机生产公司有关的设施位置，这些无人机被用于袭击俄罗斯。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: OSINTdefender According to U.S President Donald J. Trump, the leaders of Lebanon and Israel are set to speak tomorrow. The president made the announcement on his Truth Social app. This comes amidst the ongoing Israel-Lebanon negotiations centered around the disarmament of Lebanese Hezbollah and the end of the conflict in Southern Lebanon. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普称，黎巴嫩和以色列领导人定于明天对话。总统是在他的“真实社交”（Truth Social）应用上宣布这一消息的。此举正值围绕黎巴嫩真主党解除武装和结束黎巴嫩南部冲突的以黎谈判进行之际。推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump: Trying to get a little breathing room between Israel and Lebanon. It has been a long time since the two leaders have spoken, like 34 years.
